rollback_tee_success.command: set -o pipefail; rm -rf /tmp/codex-governance-rollback-evidence /tmp/codex-governance-rollback-stdout.txt; mkdir -p /tmp/codex-governance-rollback-evidence; python.exe -B scripts/lean_governance.py validate --changed-only --base-ref HEAD --enforce-sync --semantic | tee /tmp/codex-governance-rollback-evidence/legacy-changed-only-output.txt >/tmp/codex-governance-rollback-stdout.txt; test -s /tmp/codex-governance-rollback-evidence/legacy-changed-only-output.txt; wc -c /tmp/codex-governance-rollback-evidence/legacy-changed-only-output.txt

rollback_pipefail_failure.command: set -o pipefail; python.exe -c "import sys; sys.exit(7)" | tee /tmp/codex-governance-rollback-fail.txt >/tmp/codex-governance-rollback-fail-stdout.txt
